creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
So unfortunately this causes a bunch of gnome ports (and maybe more) to fail to link, due to undefined symbols: see bug 236062 comment 30.

Obviously the new default of --no-allow-shlib-undefined seems to work, in the sense that it does find a bunch of undefined symbols, but now the question is if it is too trigger-happy, or if the ports in question are having under-specified link libraries...
